title: PSYCHO-PASS
sourceNotes: S1 anime (22 eps, 2012, Production I.G.) is the original work. Paired with the Hikaru Miyoshi manga retelling 'Kanshikan Tsunemori Akane' (27 chapters / 6 vols, 2012-2014) which covers similar material. PSYCHO-PASS 2 (id 20513) and PSYCHO-PASS 3 (id 108307) are separate sequel anime not covered here.
